message:
Running command: # No cache found. Let's try running librelane WITHOUT --last-run and WITHOUT --from
# to force a completely fresh resolution - just use a new run tag
# First test: does a fresh invocation resolve to the new PDK?
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_dryrun \
    --only Yosys.JsonHeader \
    config.json 2>&1 | tail -12
